g.text: Interpretation: the frozen panel produced a selective logit shift, not a token flip. Its force-source effect was 40.6% of the full-latent swap effect. Effect ratios are intervention comparisons, not variance explained.

text.style: font-size: 7.2px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #5f6b76

g.text: Solid layer-28 arrows are retained graph edges. The dotted path compresses unshown graph nodes; the diagram is an evidence summary rather than a complete computational circuit.
